next_actions.title: Track shipment
next_actions.description: View real-time shipping status and estimated delivery date.

next_actions.title: Add items to order
next_actions.description: The order can be modified for the next 30 minutes before processing begins.

next_actions.title: Cancel order
next_actions.description: Cancel the order for a full refund. Only available before processing starts.

limitations.detail: Order can only be modified within 30 minutes of creation.

agent_guidance: Confirm with the user that the order looks correct.
If the user wants to track the shipment, use the track_shipment action.
